languages.title: Ñe’ẽ
languages.subtitle: Eiporavo ñe’ẽ ojeporúva app pukukue javeve.
languages.noResults: Ndaipóri ñe’ẽ ojoajúva ne jeheka rehe.

phone.label: Teléfono número
phone.searchCountry: Eheka tetã, código térã ñe’ẽpehẽtai ñehenói
phone.noCountries: Ndaipóri tetã ojoajúva nde jeheka rehe.
phone.invalid: Emoinge peteĩ teléfono número añetegua tetã ojeporavóvape g̃uarã.

auth.onboardingTagline: Peteĩ compañero de seguridad personal umi momento oĩva “Aime porã” ha “Aikotevẽ pytyvõ” mbytépe.
auth.createSubtitle: Eiporavo peteĩ método reike hag̃ua reñangareko hag̃ua nde gráfico seguridad rehe.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Ndaikatúi romohu’ã jeike. Ehecháke ne joaju ha eñeha’ã jey.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Oipurúvo peteĩ sesión desarrollo local rehegua. Nativo Google Sign-In omba’apo peteĩ desarrollo ñemopu’ãme.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Embojoaju ko’áĝa térã eñepyrũ ha emoĩve upe rire.
auth.northStarBody: Pe VL01 ojeporúva ikatu ombohape flujo de seguridad grifo ha gesto de prensa puku rupive.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Ne irũ seguridad rehegua manso mapa-pe ha ñehenóipe.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear ikatu oipytyvõ modo hogar, modo guardián, modo emergencia, llamada excusa ha soporte voz rehegua.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Ojepuru mapa, zona de peligro, og̃uahẽ porã ha SOS contexto-pe g̃uarã.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving ojerure moõpa oĩ ikatu hag̃uáicha umi oñangarekóva ontende moõpa ikatu oñeikotevẽ pytyvõ. Ikatu remoambue kóva upe rire Ñembohekorãme.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Umi marandu oipytyvõ umi jeike ha umi mba’e ojehúva emergencia-pe.
permissions.notificationsBody: Roipuru momarandu-nte umi ñe’ẽmondo seguridad rehegua, ñembopyahu emergencia ha mandu’a rehegua rembohapéva.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Ubicación omantene contexto seguridad rehegua hekopete
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving oipuru nde reimeha mapa de seguridad, zona de peligro, compartición pya’e ha SOS contexto-pe g̃uarã. Ikatu remoambue kóva upe rire Ñembohekorãme.
permissions.notificationsRationaleTitle: Umi alerta seguridad rehegua oikotevẽ marandu
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving omondo mandu’a jeike rehegua, ñembopyahu emergencia rehegua ha ñe’ẽmondo seguridad rehegua rembohapéva. Ndoroiporúi momarandu marandurã.
permissions.microphoneRationaleTitle: Micrófono omombarete umi ñehenói seguridad rehegua
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving oipuru ne micrófono remoñepyrũ jave añoite peteĩ AI compañero térã seguridad ñehenói.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving oipuru Bluetooth ombojoaju hagua NorthStar joya ndive, omoñe e estado conexión rehegua ha ombohape umi flujo seguridad rehegua pe ojeporúvagui.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving oñongatu ko flujo ojeguerekóva Ñemboheko ha panel-gui.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Eiporavo iñirũ ñe’ẽ oñeñandu porãvéva oñehendu haguã.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Ojesareko kirirĩháme ojeguereko haguã seguridad ára ha ára.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Po grifo ikatu ojeescala SOS ha alertas guardián peve.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Ejapo petet razón graciosa reheja hagua petet situación incómoda.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Emoñepyrũ peteĩ ñehenói compañero tiempo real-pe reikotevẽ jave pytyvõ.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Eñeha’ã umi flujo seguridad rehegua peteĩ demostración baja presión-pe.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Eñongatu hi’aguĩ umi joya reescanea aja.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth ndaikatúi oñepyrũ escaneo. Eñeha’ã jey.
jewelry.scanFailed: Ndorojuhúi joya hi’aguĩva. Ejesareko Bluetooth rehe, eñongatu NorthStar hi’aguĩ, ha eñeha’ã jey.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth ndaikatúi oñepyrũ escaneo. Ejesareko Bluetooth jeike rehe ha eñeha’ã jey.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Oñembogue jeike tembipuru hi’aguĩvape. Eheja Bluetooth jeike Ñembohekorãme, upéi eñeha’ã jey.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar ipukueterei oñembojoaju haguã. Emoaguĩve ha eñeha’ã jey.
jewelry.connectFailed: Ndaikatúi rojoaju NorthStar ndive. Ehecháke ojekargapa ha hi’aguĩpa, upéi eñeha’ã jey.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Eñongatu NorthStar cargado ha hi’aguĩ ko teléfono-gui, upéi eescanea jey.

home.subtitle: Tabla de mando de seguridad compañero rehegua
home.readyBody: Ñe’ẽ, mapa, joya ha guardián opyta peteĩ grifo-pe.

map.title: Mapa de seguridad rehegua
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go jehechaukarã; Mapbox ojapo peteĩ desarrollo ñemopu’ãme.
map.updateFailed: Ndaikatúi rombopyahu nde reimeha. Eñeha’ã jey.
map.notRequested: Ndojejeruréi ojeike haguã moõpa oĩ. Ikatu emboguata upe rire Ñemboheko guive.
map.permissionOff: Oñembogue jeike tenda rehegua. Emboguata Configuración-pe ecentra hag̃ua nde ári pe mapa de seguridad.
map.timeout: Nde reimeha ogueraha areve oñeha’arõvagui. Eñemongu’e peteĩ hendápe peteĩ señal hesakãvéva reheve ha eñeha’ã jey.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Ojehecháta ko’ápe umi tenda ojeroviaitéva reñongatúva ojeike pya’e hag̃ua.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Eñembojoaju porãvo ne ñe’ẽ irũ ndive...
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Emoñepyrũ ñehenói térã ehai peteĩ marandu reime jave preparado.

history.clearMessage: Kóva oipe’a ko tembipuru’ígui marandu AI compañero oñeñongatúva.
history.title: Ñemongeta rembiasakue
history.subtitle: AI marandu iñirũnguéra oñeñongatúva ko tembipuru’ípe.
history.emptyMessage: Ne AI irũ ñemongeta ojehechaukáta ko’ápe ne ñehenói peteĩha rire.
history.loadFailed: Ndaikatúi rokarga ñemongeta rembiasakue. Eñeha’ã jey.
history.clearFailed: Ndaikatúikuri romopotĩ ñomongeta rembiasakue. Eñeha’ã jey.
history.deleteFailed: Ndaikatúikuri rombogue upe ñomongeta. Eñeha’ã jey.

voices.title: Che seguridad ñehenói ñe’ẽ
voices.subtitle: Eiporavo iñirũ ñe’ẽ oñeñandúva ohendu porãha.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Ko muestra de voz ndaikatúi oñembopu. Eñeha’ã jey.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Eipuru ñembohovái compañero rehegua oñembojoajúva ndojeguerekói jave red térã Hume credencial.
settings.privacyBody: Emosẽ térã embogue umi dato local oñeñongatúva ko tembipuru’ípe.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Kóva oipe’a ne perfil, ñemboheko, contacto emergencia, ñomongeta rembiasakue, permiso mandu’a ha sesión auth local ko tembipuru’ígui.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Ndaikatúi oñembogue umi dato local ko’áĝaite.

sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, guardián, ha contacto emergencia rehegua

settings.updateFailedMessage: Ndaikatúikuri roñongatu upe preferencia. Eñeha’ã jey.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Ne sesión oĩ gueteri activo. Eñeha’ã jey.

contacts.title: Contacto emergencia rehegua
contacts.subtitle: Tapicha ojeroviakuaáva ojeguerekóva umi flujo de seguridad jave.
contacts.name: Téra
contacts.emptyMessage: Emoĩ peteĩ tapicha rejeroviaha ikatu hag̃uáicha oĩma preparádo peteĩ flujo de seguridad oikotevẽ jave hesekuéra.
contacts.removeMessage: Ko tapicha ndojehecháivéima nde flujo de emergencia-pe.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Ndaikatúi roñongatu ko contacto. Ehecháke umi detalle ha eñeha’ã jey.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Ndaikatúi roipe’a ko contacto. Eñeha’ã jey.

friends.title: Amigokuéra
friends.subtitle: Guardia, mba’ejerure ha gráfico emergencia rehegua.
friends.emptyTitle: Ne círculo de seguridad oĩ nandi
friends.emptyMessage: Ko’ápe ojehechaukáta angirũ ha guardián ojeroviaitéva oñembojoapývo.

emergency.title: Emergencia rehegua SOS
emergency.subtitle: Embotuichave reikotevẽ jave añoite pytyvõ pya’e.
emergency.body: Kóva oikuaaukáta nde flujo de seguridad ha ombosako’íta umi contacto emergencia rehegua.
emergency.addContact: Emoĩ peteĩ contacto emergencia rehegua Ñembohekorãme.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Stub de compartición de localización oĩma. Embojoaju punto paha compartición backend rehegua emondo hag̃ua enlace oikovéva.

capybearTap.title: Capybear tapa
capybearTap.subtitle: Epoko mokõi jey nde NorthStar rehe reity hagua peteĩ naranja seguridad rehegua.
capybearTap.body: Ruta gesto rehegua oĩma cableado evento BLE-pe g̃uarã.

errors.voiceOffline: Ha’ete ku nde reime’ỹva línea-pe. Ne marandu oñemondota reñembojoaju jeývo.
errors.voiceQueued: Marandu oñeñongatu. Oñemondóta oñembojoaju jeývo ñe’ẽ irũ.
errors.voiceConnecting: Eñembojoaju porãvo ne ñe’ẽ irũ ndive...
errors.microphone: Oñeikotevẽ micrófono jeike oñehenói hag̃ua ñe’ẽ rupive. Ikatu emboguata Ñembohekorãme, térã ehai peteĩ marandu hendaguépe.
errors.billing: Pe ñe’ẽ ñemoirũ en línea ndojeguerekói sapy’ami. Ikatu resegui pe compañero offline ndive.
errors.authentication: Pe ñe’ẽ irũ ndaikatúikuri omoañete ko sesión. Eike jey térã eipuru pe irũ oĩva línea’ỹre ko’áĝa g̃uarã.
errors.timeout: Pe ñe’ẽ irũ ipukueterei ombohovái haĝua. Ehecháke ne joaju ha eñeha’ã jey.
errors.network: Ndaikatúi roguahẽ ñe’ẽ irũme. Ehecháke ne joaju, upéi eñeha’ã jey térã eñepyrũ esẽ’ỹre.
errors.genericVoice: Oĩ mba’e ombotapykuéva ñehenói ñe’ẽ rupive. Eñeha’ã jey, térã esegui pe compañero offline ndive.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving oikotevẽ micrófono jeike seguridad ha AI compañero ñehenói.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving oipuru nde reimeha pe mapa seguridad rehegua ha umi mba’e seguridad rehegua hi’aguĩvape g̃uarã.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving oipuru Bluetooth oñembojoaju hagua nde NorthStar joya seguridad rehegua ndive.
ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Ko jeike hag̃ua jeporavo ndojeporukuaái ko app rembiapópe.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Jehechaukarã reko oiporu marandu gua'u oñeñongatúva ko tembiporúpe añoite. Umi tembiapo joajuha ndojehechaukái mávapa oiporu, ha ko sesión oñepyrũ jeýta oñemyenyhẽ jeývo pe app.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Pe código jehechajeyrã ndoikói térã hi'ára opáma. Ejerure código pyahu ha eñeha'ã jey.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Hetaiterei reñeha'ã reike. Eha'arõ sapy'ami, upéi eñeha'ã jey.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Jeike jehechajey ipukueterei. Ehecha ne conexión ha eñeha'ã jey.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Ndaikatúi rohupyty jeike rembiapo. Ehecha ne conexión ha eñeha'ã jey.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Ne sesión ára opáma. Eike jey.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Ndaikatúi oñemyenyhẽ pe mapa tekorosãrã. Ehecha ne conexión ha eñeha'ã jey.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Ndojeporukuaái ne renda ko'ag̃agua. Ojehechauka ne renda ipahaitéva oñeñongatúva %{capturedAt} guive.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Ndaikatúi romboja'o ne renda. Ehecha pe jeheja renda rehegua ha eñeha'ã jey.
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Kóva che renda ipahaitéva oñeñongatúva, ojehaiva'ekue %{capturedAt}-pe:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Bluetooth jeike oñembogue. Emboguejy Settings-pe, upéi eñeha'ã jey.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth oñembogue. Emboguejy, upéi eñeha'ã jey.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Bluetooth ñembojoaju ndojeporukuaái ko tembiporu térã app rembiapópe.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Ndaikatúi rojuhu NorthStar. Ereko ag̃ui, ehecha Bluetooth ha eñeha'ã jey.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Ndojejuhúi mba'eveichagua NorthStar tembiporu ag̃ui. Ereko ag̃ui ha ehekapyahu jey.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Ndaikatúi rombojoaju NorthStar ndive. Ereko henyhẽ ha ag̃ui, upéi eñeha'ã jey.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Ndaikatúi roñongatu ko renda. Eñeha'ã jey.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Ndojeporukuaái avave oñehenói hag̃ua jekupytýpe; noñehenóiri.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Ñe'ẽ rupive ne irũ ndojeporukuaái ko'ág̃a. Eñeha'ã jey ag̃ave térã econtinua ne irũ oñeikotevẽ'ỹva conexión ndive.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
